pi_items.source: Explicitly targeted in setup_task.sh (mkdir -p /home/ga/Downloads) and export_result.sh (find /home/ga/Downloads -name '*.seb')
Synthetically generated via MariaDB SQL injection in setup_task.sh and explicitly required in export_result.sh
Explicitly documented in verifier.py docstring 'File is non-empty (>100 bytes) (15 pts)'

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated configuration data injected into the MariaDB database via setup_task.sh, specifically targeting the configuration named 'Anatomy Midterm Config'. The resulting export must be a non-empty file (>100 bytes) with a '.seb' extension, saved directly to the '/home/ga/Downloads' directory.
